# Momin Al Zaraa

## About

Full-stack developer and Laravel enthusiast specializing in scalable web applications and developer tools. Creator of **Filament Composer Release Notifier**, which surfaces Composer dependency drift inside Filament panels for **informational** visibility (no automatic updates), and **Filament Localization**, which automates structured translation workflows for Filament resources.

## Projects

- **Filament Composer Release Notifier** — Active Composer / Packagist version comparison in Filament (resource, widget, optional mail)
- **Filament Localization** — Scan and localize Filament resources with structured translation files

## Expertise

- Laravel & PHP
- Filament administration panels
- Multi-tenant applications
- APIs and database design
- Tailwind CSS UI work
